title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Hexaware Technologies

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Hexaware Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Hexaware Technologies in Dhanbad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Hexaware Technologies:
Hexaware Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hexaware Technologies!
